ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Federici Delphini mathemaci praestantissimi. De fluxu et refluxu aquae maris
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Subtilis et erudita disputatio: eiusdem De motu octavae spherae
ItacWorkItem.Notes: The dedication was signed by `Mathematici Academiae Venetae`.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
